backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for BB Homeo Care, with functions to submit and list consultation bookings and to create, retrieve, and search patient records by UHID.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels — covering logo generation, header logo replacement, color theme updates, and other UI/UX changes.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short summaries describing each file's role, covering styles, hooks, layout, pages, and routing for the BB Homeo Care app.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'BB Homeo Care' and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component that configures TanStack Router with routes for Home, Booking, BookingsList, PatientDatabase, and About, all wrapped in the shared Layout.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Shared layout component with a sticky header displaying the BB Homeo Care logo, desktop and mobile navigation, Internet Identity auth controls, and a footer.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP actor, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Hook and context provider for Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status derived from the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating bookings and patient records via the ICP actor, including getAllBookings, submitBooking, searchPatients, getPatientRecord, and createPatientRecord.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines a custom OKLCH-based design token palette (sage green, sandy peach, muted teal) for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page for BB Homeo Care displaying the clinic's mission, core values, and list of treatable conditions with a hero section and styled cards.
frontend/src/pages/Booking.tsx: Booking page with a validated form for patients to submit consultation appointment requests, showing success/error states and using the useSubmitBooking mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/BookingsList.tsx: Admin page that lists all clinic bookings, gated behind Internet Identity authentication, with a lock screen for unauthenticated users and loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero banner with the clinic logo, feature highlights, and a call-to-action button linking to the booking page.
frontend/src/pages/PatientDatabase.tsx: React page for searching and creating patient records, gated behind Internet Identity authentication. Shows a lock screen for unauthenticated users and a searchable table plus add-patient dialog for authenticated staff.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (primary, secondary, sidebar, chart, etc.), border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Persisted project state JSON tracking the current version, feature list, architectural notes, and image requirements for the 'Balanced Being / BB Homeo Care' healthcare platform, including logo generation and theme update tasks.
